core.label: Datalog Fundamentals
core.description: Declarative logic query language for deductive databases.

topics.label: Facts & Rules
topics.description: Declare facts (parent(tom, bob).) and derive new facts with rules.

topics.label: Queries
topics.description: Query derived and base facts. Datalog evaluates all rules to a fixed point.

topics.label: Recursion
topics.description: Recursive rules for transitive closure (ancestor from parent). Datalog guarantees termination.

topics.label: Negation & Stratification
topics.description: Stratified negation for safe negation-as-failure. Not all Prolog programs are valid Datalog.

topics.label: Aggregation
topics.description: Count, sum, min, max in extended Datalog (varies by implementation).
